zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stratton於1410年出生在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓時，她的父親John Barentyne29歲，母親Alice Battell32歲。她於1437年與John Sulyard II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年12月21日在英國艾可奧加享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stratton于1410年出生在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓时，她的父亲John Barentyne29岁，母亲Alice Battell32岁。她于1437年与John Sulyard II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1464年12月21日在英国艾可奧加享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stratton was born in 1410, in Weston, Staffordshire, England, her father, John Barentyne, was 29 and her mother, Alice Battell, was 32. She married John Sulyard II in 1437. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 21 December 1464, in Ongar, Essex, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stratton est née en 1410, à Weston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Barentyne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Battell, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Sulyard II en 1437. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1464, à Ongar, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stratton 1410 in Weston, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barentyne 29 und ihre Mutter Alice Battell 32. Sie hat 1437 John Sulyard II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1464 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Ongar, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stratton è nata il nel 1410 nel Weston, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, John Barentyne, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Alice Battell, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John Sulyard II nel 1437. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 dicembre 1464, nel Ongar, Essex, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Strattonが1410年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンで生まれた時，父John Barentyneは29歳，母Alice Battellは32歳であった。1437年にJohn Sulyard IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1464年12月21日にイギリスエセックスオンガーで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stratton(이)가 1410년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barentyne(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Battell(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1437년 John Sulyard II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 12월 21일 영국 에세스 옹가르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stratton nasceu em 1410, em Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barentyne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Battell, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Sulyard II em 1437. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1464, em Ongar, Essex, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stratton родилась в 1410 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Barentyne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Battell, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Sulyard II в 1437 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 декабря 1464 г. в местности онгар, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stratton nació en 1410, en Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Barentyne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Battell, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Sulyard II en 1437. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1464, en Ongar, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
